lessons.title: Describe the government and its structure
lessons.content_md:
Understand government and how it is organized.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/describe-government-its-structure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Describe the government and its structure

lessons.title: Describe significant government strategy actions
lessons.content_md:
Understand legislation, memoranda, executive orders, and policies that significantly set the government's cloud computing approach.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/describe-significant-government-strategy-actions/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Describe Cloud Business Case Analysis
lessons.content_md:
Understand a cloud business case analysis through a business case analysis, analysis of alternatives, and non-financial operational benefits.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/describe-cloud-business-case-analysis/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Describe governmental cloud strategy
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Describe governmental cloud strategy**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
